subject: CRITICAL: Multiple P0 System Failures Blocking All Progress

content.summary: Three critical system failures identified: Worker assignment breakdown, Authentication system collapse, and Validation gaps allowing false claims

failures.description: All tasks assigned to 'Memory Sync Agent' instead of real workers, 8+ hours stalled
clawd-zsk failed validation, signin endpoints 404, FALSE CLAIMS by worker
failures.impact: Phase 1 MVP blocked, cascading failure to all auth-dependent work

failures.description: Second incident of workers submitting false completion claims
